body.title: Wire semantic palace search into sprint-ticket, audit, and context-load
body.text:
# D-semantic-palace-search-injection-2026-05-05
**title:** Wire semantic palace search into sprint-ticket, audit, and context-load
**date:** 2026-05-05
**status:** open
**spawned_tickets:** T-palace-search-sprint-plan, T-palace-search-audit-conflicts, T-palace-search-context-load

## Decision narrative
Igor's palace embeddings already support semantic search via mcp__igor__memory_search. The highest-value injection points (in priority order): (1) sprint-ticket Step 4 plan review — embed ticket description to surface relevant constraints before coding; (2) /decided audit step and /audit-ticket — embed decision/ticket to detect prior conflicts automatically; (3) context-load Step 2b — embed in-flight task to pull relevant nodes at session start. All changes are additive skill-file text edits; non-blocking when search returns nothing.

## Rollup

**Closed at:** 2026-05-05T21:27:24.420628+00:00
**Ticket count:** 3 (all closed)

### Shipped via
- T-palace-search-sprint-plan (S) — CLOSED: Semantic palace search at sprint-ticket plan step  `done` — added memory_search step at Step 4 of sprint-ticket skill before inertia check
- T-palace-search-audit-conflicts (S) — CLOSED: Semantic conflict detection in /decided and /audit-ticket  `done` — added memory_search to /decided Step 2.5 (before audit-design) and /audit-ticket Step 0 (semantic duplicate check)
- T-palace-search-context-load (S) — DESIGNED: Semantic palace retrieval in /context-load Step 2b  `done` — added Step 2c conditional in-flight semantic search to /context-load

_Generated by cc_queue.py _decision_rollup. File-stub until T-decisions-into-palace-subtree moves rollups into the memory palace._

## Provenance
Absorbed from the TheIgors.archive lineage 2026-06-28 (D-all-generations-consolidation-2026-06-28). Historical record; original status: open.
